items.title: Are Extra Value Meals the Key to McDonald's Traffic Recovery in 2026?
items.description: MCD is betting on $5 and $8 Extra Value Meals to rebuild U.S. traffic into 2026, aiming to reset affordability as pressures persist.

items.title: Arcos Dorados Provides Restaurant Openings and CapEx Guidance for 2026
items.description: MONTEVIDEO, Uruguay, January 28, 2026--Arcos Dorados Holdings Inc. (NYSE: ARCO) ("Arcos Dorados" or the "Company"), Latin America’s largest restaurant chain and the world’s largest independent McDonald’s franchisee, today provided guidance for restaurant openings and total capital expenditures for 2026.

items.title: Empty Towers And Full Plates: China's Office Glut And its Dumpling King
